articles.title: 10 combine standouts that could make sense for Patriots to select in April’s NFL Draft
articles.description:
The weekend showed the depth at a few of the Patriots' biggest positions of need.

The post 10 combine standouts that could make sense for Patriots to select in April’s NFL Draft appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots identified key positions of need during the NFL Combine weekend.
Ten standout players could significantly enhance the team's roster in April's draft.
Local fans anticipate potential improvements to the team's performance next season.

articles.title: 3 US troops killed and 5 are seriously wounded during Iran attacks, military says
articles.description:
U.S. Central Command, which oversees the Middle East, announced the deaths in a post on X but did not say when and where they occurred.

The post 3 US troops killed and 5 are seriously wounded during Iran attacks, military says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Three U.S. troops killed and five seriously wounded in recent Iran attacks.
U.S. Central Command confirmed the casualties but did not disclose specific location or date.
Local Boston military families may face increased anxiety and concern over troop safety.

articles.title: White House official: Iran suggests it’s open to talks and Trump says he’s ‘eventually’ willing
articles.description:
The official, who spoke on condition of anonymity to discuss internal administration deliberations, said President Donald Trump says he is “eventually” willing to talk but that for now the military operation “continues unabated.”

The post White House official: Iran suggests it’s open to talks and Trump says he’s ‘eventually’ willing appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: President Trump indicates willingness to negotiate with Iran, impacting U.S. foreign policy.
Military operations against Iran continue without pause, affecting regional stability.
Boston residents may face economic implications from ongoing military engagements abroad.
